controller: hawking-seed-c state machine (single controller + append-only sealed log)
evaluation: output divergence vs BF16/MXFP4 reference on deterministic probes
exact_rational_rates: latent-rank ladder -> increasing sub-bit BPW, all <1.0
family: ternary latent factorization (Forge) + sparse f16 Doctor residual
law: sub-bit-first: start below 1.0 BPW at an aggressive stress point; representation (latent rank) escalates BEFORE BPW; Doctor at same rate; every Doctor byte counted; NO Escape Receipt (stays sub-bit); F1/scheduler-deferral never authorize escape
scope: layer 0, experts 0..127 (bounded 256x256 reference slice per expert)
stopping_rule: all experts in scope checkpointed; sealed on completion
